formulas.name: Key Algebraic Identities
formulas.formula:
(a+b)² = a²+2ab+b²
(a-b)² = a²-2ab+b²
a²-b² = (a+b)(a-b)
(a+b)³ = a³+3a²b+3ab²+b³
(a-b)³ = a³-3a²b+3ab²-b³

vars.d: Any two algebraic terms or numbers

formulas.name: a³+b³ / a³-b³
formulas.formula:
a³+b³ = (a+b)(a²-ab+b²)
a³-b³ = (a-b)(a²+ab+b²)

formulas.name: Three Variable Identities
formulas.formula:
(a+b+c)² = a²+b²+c²+2(ab+bc+ca)
a³+b³+c³-3abc = (a+b+c)(a²+b²+c²-ab-bc-ca)
If a+b+c=0, then a³+b³+c³=3abc

examples.q: If a+b+c=0 and a=1, b=2, find a³+b³+c³.

formulas.name: Quadratic Formula
formulas.formula:
For ax²+bx+c=0:
x = [-b ± sqrt(b²-4ac)] ÷ 2a
Discriminant D = b²-4ac

formulas.name: Sum and Product of Roots
formulas.formula:
For ax²+bx+c=0:
Sum of roots = -b/a
Product of roots = c/a

examples.q: Find sum and product of roots of 2x²-8x+6=0

formulas.name: Linear Equations
formulas.formula:
ax + b = 0 ? x = -b/a
Two equations: Solve by substitution or elimination

formulas.name: Simultaneous Equations
formulas.formula:
Method 1: Substitution
Method 2: Elimination
Method 3: Cross-multiplication

formulas.name: Inequalities
formulas.formula:
ax + b > 0 ? x > -b/a (if a>0)
ax + b > 0 ? x < -b/a (if a<0)
Quadratic: Check sign of a and roots

formulas.name: Maximum and Minimum Values
formulas.formula:
Quadratic ax²+bx+c:
If a>0: Minimum at x = -b/2a
If a<0: Maximum at x = -b/2a
Value = -D/4a where D = b²-4ac

formulas.name: Factorization Techniques
formulas.formula:
Common factor: a(b+c)
Difference of squares: a²-b² = (a+b)(a-b)
Grouping: ab+ac+bd+cd = a(b+c)+d(b+c)

formulas.name: Perfect Square Trinomials
formulas.formula:
x² + 2ax + a² = (x+a)²
x² - 2ax + a² = (x-a)²
x² + (a+b)x + ab = (x+a)(x+b)

formulas.name: Rational Expressions
formulas.formula:
Simplify: Factor and cancel
Add/Subtract: Find LCD
Multiply/Divide: Factor first

formulas.name: Exponent Rules
formulas.formula:
a^m × a^n = a^(m+n)
a^m ÷ a^n = a^(m-n)
(a^m)^n = a^(mn)
a^-n = 1/a^n
a^0 = 1

formulas.name: Logarithm Basics
formulas.formula:
log_a(b) = c ? a^c = b
log(ab) = log a + log b
log(a/b) = log a - log b
log(a^n) = n log a

formulas.name: SSC Favorite Patterns
formulas.formula:
(x+1/x)² = x² + 2 + 1/x²
(x+1/x)³ = x³ + 3x + 3/x + 1/x³
If x+1/x = k, then x²+1/x² = k²-2

formulas.name: Age Problems
formulas.formula:
Current age = x
After n years: x+n
Before n years: x-n
Sum of ages: Use variables

examples.q: Father is 3 times older than son. After 10 years, ratio is 2:1. Find current ages.

formulas.name: Speed-Distance-Time Algebra
formulas.formula:
Distance = Speed × Time
Relative speed problems
Use variables for unknown quantities

examples.q: Train covers 300km. If speed increased by 20km/hr, time reduces by 1 hour. Find original speed.

formulas.name: Mixture Problems
formulas.formula:
Alligation method:
(Cheaper rate) : (Dearer rate) = (Mean - Cheaper) : (Dearer - Mean)

examples.q: Mix tea at ?60/kg with tea at ?80/kg to get ?70/kg. Find ratio.

formulas.name: Work and Time Algebra
formulas.formula:
Work = Rate × Time
If A alone: a days, B alone: b days
Together: 1/a + 1/b work per day

examples.q: A can do work in 15 days, B in 20 days. Together?

formulas.name: Partnership Problems
formulas.formula:
Profit sharing ratio = Investment × Time
If investments different, calculate accordingly

examples.q: A invests ?5000 for 6 months, B invests ?8000 for 4 months. Profit ratio?

formulas.name: Number Series Algebra
formulas.formula:
Arithmetic: a, a+d, a+2d, ...
Geometric: a, ar, ar², ...
Find nth term using formulas

formulas.name: Polynomial Division
formulas.formula:
Long division method
Synthetic division for linear factors
Remainder theorem: f(a) = remainder when divided by (x-a)

formulas.name: Coordinate Geometry Basics
formulas.formula:
Distance = sqrt[(x2-x1)² + (y2-y1)²]
Slope = (y2-y1)/(x2-x1)
Midpoint = ((x1+x2)/2, (y1+y2)/2)

formulas.name: Linear Programming Basics
formulas.formula:
Maximize/Minimize objective function
Subject to constraints
Find feasible region

examples.q: Maximize Z = 2x + 3y, subject to x + y = 10, x,y = 0

formulas.name: Probability Basics
formulas.formula:
P(A) = Favorable outcomes / Total outcomes
P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A and B)
P(A and B) = P(A) × P(B) (independent)

examples.q: Coin tossed twice. Probability of exactly one head?

formulas.name: Set Theory Basics
formulas.formula:
|A U B| = |A| + |B| - |A n B|
|A n B| = |A| + |B| - |A U B|
Complement: |A'| = Total - |A|

formulas.name: Complex Numbers Basics
formulas.formula:
i² = -1
a + bi: real part a, imaginary part b
Add: (a+bi) + (c+di) = (a+c) + (b+d)i

formulas.name: Matrices Basics
formulas.formula:
Addition: Element-wise
Multiplication: Row × Column
2×2 determinant: ad - bc

formulas.name: Sequence and Series
formulas.formula:
AP: a, a+d, a+2d, ...
GP: a, ar, ar², ...
Sum AP: n/2[2a+(n-1)d]
Sum GP: a(r^n-1)/(r-1)

examples.q: Sum of first 10 terms of AP: 2, 5, 8, ...

formulas.name: Permutation and Combination
formulas.formula:
nPr = n!/(n-r)!
nCr = n!/(r!(n-r)!)
nCr = nC(n-r)

formulas.name: Mathematical Induction
formulas.formula:
Prove for n=1
Assume true for n=k
Prove for n=k+1

formulas.name: Functional Equations
formulas.formula:
Find function satisfying given conditions
Use substitution and elimination

examples.q: Find f(x) if f(x+1) = f(x) + 2x + 1 and f(0) = 1

formulas.name: Recursive Relations
formulas.formula:
a_(n+1) = f(a_n)
Find general term using patterns

steps: This is AP with a=2, d=3

formulas.name: Modular Arithmetic
formulas.formula:
a = b (mod n) means n divides (a-b)
Properties: (a+b) mod n = [(a mod n) + (b mod n)] mod n

formulas.name: Graph Theory Basics
formulas.formula:
Vertices, edges, degree
Handshake lemma: Sum of degrees = 2 × edges

examples.q: Triangle has 3 vertices, each degree 2. Number of edges?

formulas.name: Calculus Basics
formulas.formula:
Derivative: dy/dx = limit of difference quotient
Integration: Area under curve
Power rule: d/dx(x^n) = nx^(n-1)

formulas.name: Trigonometric Algebra
formulas.formula:
sin²x + cos²x = 1
1 + tan²x = sec²x
1 + cot²x = cosec²x

examples.q: If sin x = 3/5, find cos x

formulas.name: Vector Algebra
formulas.formula:
Dot product: a·b = |a||b|cos?
Cross product: a×b = |a||b|sin?
Magnitude: |a| = sqrt(x²+y²+z²)

formulas.name: Differential Equations
formulas.formula:
dy/dx = f(x,y)
Separable: dy/dx = g(x)h(y)
Linear: dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x)
